channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7824] sanity-sec test_22: test failed to respond and timed out
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/9c83e25e-d99c-11e5-9ebe-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_22 failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

The test log is completely empty.

suite_stdout shows the following information for sanity-sec test 22

06:34:40:== sanity-sec test 22: test nodemap mapped_trusted_admin fileops ===================================== 06:34:39 (1456065279)
06:34:41:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.identity_upcall=NONE
06:34:41:mdt.lustre-MDT0000.identity_upcall=NONE
06:34:41:CMD: onyx-31vm1.onyx.hpdd.intel.com /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:41:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add c0
06:34:42:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_range --name c0 --range 10.2.4.102@tcp
06:34:42:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:44:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:44:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:44:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap=c0
06:34:45:nodemap.add_nodemap=c0
06:34:45:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:45:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:46:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:46:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_range='c0 10.2.4.102@tcp'
06:34:47:nodemap.add_nodemap_range=c0 10.2.4.102@tcp
06:34:47:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype uid --idmap 60003:60000
06:34:47:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:47:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:48:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:48:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap='c0 uid 60003:60000'
06:34:48:nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap=c0 uid 60003:60000
06:34:48:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype gid --idmap 60003:60000
06:34:49:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:49:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:49:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:50:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap='c0 gid 60003:60000'
06:34:50:nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap=c0 gid 60003:60000
06:34:50:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype uid --idmap 60004:60002
06:34:50:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:51:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:51:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:52:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap='c0 uid 60004:60002'
06:34:52:nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap=c0 uid 60004:60002
06:34:52:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_idmap --name c0 --idtype gid --idmap 60004:60002
06:34:52:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:54:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:54:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:55:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap='c0 gid 60004:60002'
06:34:55:nodemap.add_nodemap_idmap=c0 gid 60004:60002
06:34:55:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param nodemap.c0.idmap
06:34:55:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param nodemap.c0.idmap
06:34:56:CMD: onyx-31vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:56:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add c1
06:34:56:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl nodemap_add_range --name c1 --range 10.2.4.103@tcp
06:34:57:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:58:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:59:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:34:59:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap=c1
06:34:59:nodemap.add_nodemap=c1
06:34:59:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:35:00:CMD: onyx-31vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:35:00:CMD: onyx-31vm8 /usr/sbin/lctl list_nids | grep tcp | cut -f 1 -d '@'
06:35:00:CMD: 10.2.4.109 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param nodemap.add_nodemap_range='c1 10.2.4.103@tcp'
item.environment:
Full - EL7.1 Server/EL7.1 Client - ZFS
branch: b2_8 , build# 6
item.summary: sanity-sec test_22: test failed to respond and timed out

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
